name: INCOME OPPORTUNITY REALTY INVESTORS INC /TX/
business: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. invests in mortgage notes receivables and real property. Its principal source of income is interest income on note receivables from related parties. The company is externally managed by Pillar Income Asset Management, Inc. and has no employees.

exposures.sentence: We invest in notes receivables that are collateralized by investments in land and/or multifamily properties.
